message:
fix: scope Dolt migration helpers to current database (bd-0gfm6)

The columnExists and tableExists helpers in Dolt migrations were
querying information_schema without specifying the database name.
This caused migrations to incorrectly skip adding columns/tables
if they existed in ANY Dolt database, not just the current one.

Added table_schema = DATABASE() to both queries to properly scope
checks to the current database.

Fixes: bd-0gfm6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian

Role: polecats
